case_title: KAREN FRANCES TAPPER VS. AIDA TABAN

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAPPER, KAREN FRANCES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TABAN, AIDA $650.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $710.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

BENCH LETTER ISSUED FOR DEC-15-2011; JUDGMENT DEBTOR AIDA TABAN FAILED TO APPEAR. WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ORDERED ISSUED. BAIL SET AT 500.00. BENCH WARRANT IS ISSUED AS JUDGMENT DEBTOR FAILED TO APPEAR TODAY. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: SEP-08-2011 AS TO DEFENDANT TABAN, AIDA

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF OCT-31-2011 IS CONTINUED TO NOV-07-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF(JC) AND DEFENDANT(JD), BENCH LETTER IS WITHDRAWN. CONINUED FOR JUDGE MITCHLL TO HEAR CASE. DEFENDANT(JD) IS GIVEN SC-133 FORM TO COMPLETE AND RETURN ON NOVEMBER 7, 2011. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF DEC-05-2011 IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO DEC-15-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: B.PAREDES. NOT REPORTED. (506)
WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ISSUED, BAIL SET AT $500.00, WARRANT FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR REVIEW AS TO DEFENDANT TABAN, AIDA
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR PER AGREEMENT TO APPEAR ON CIVIL BENCH WARRANT IN SMALL CLAIMS COURT. HEARING SET FOR FEB-27-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF AUG-27-2012 IS CONTINUED TO OCT-15-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $30.00) SERVED SEP-20-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TABAN, AIDA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-13-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-13-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PALINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF OCT-03-2011 IS CONTINUED TO OCT-17-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT IS TO RETURN WITH HER FINANCIAL DOCUMENTATION. DEFENDANT IS TO COMPLETE THE SC-133 FORM THAT WAS PROVIDED TO HER TODAY IN COURT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF(JC) AND DEFENDANT(JD). JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-13-2010 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT TABAN, AIDA HEARING SET FOR OCT-03-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO AIDA TABAN 2920 TARAVAL ST., #7 SF CA 94118

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF NOV-07-2011 IS CONTINUED TO DEC-05-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED. APPEARANCE BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SIGNED & SEALED (ORIGINAL) BENCH WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ORDER FORWARDED TO SHERIFF'S DEPT. -JUDGE DONALD S MITCHELL-
PROOF OF SERVICE ON BENCH WARRANT (SERVED BY SHERIFF) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAPPER, KAREN FRANCES
DECLARATION OF FOR CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT TABAN, AIDA

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF FEB-27-2012 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-27-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. "JUDGMENT DEBTOR AGREES TO PAY PLAINTIFF $20.00 PER MONTH BEGINNING MARCH 3, 2012 AND CONTINUED ON THE 3RD OF EACH MONTH", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF NOV-15-2012 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JAN-14-2013 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $670.00 FILED BY TAPPER, KAREN FRANCES AS TO DEFENDANT TABAN, AIDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-13-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF OCT-17-2011 IS CONTINUED TO OCT-31-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: S.VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

(506) BENCH LETTER ISSUED 8-27-12 IS WITHDRAWN.
